title: Manning National Zoo
summary: The Episode 1 location fortified by the Outcasts after Emeline Shaw retreats from Roosevelt Island.

claims.text: Emeline Shaw retreats into Manning National Zoo after her defeat on Roosevelt Island.
Outcasts protect Shaw inside the zoo with followers and blockades.
The mission brief notes animal-species infographics distributed through the zoo environment.

paragraphs.text: The zoo becomes an improvised Outcast fortress and the setting for the pursuit of Emeline Shaw, while its environmental displays preserve traces of the site's pre-collapse purpose.

verification.notes: Environmental text and exact collectible locations require direct capture.
